creator: glebius@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Mon Sep 30 16:30:34  2024 UTC, zlei@FreeBSD.org wrote:
> Kristof brought unicast mode for CARP. Need to re-evaluate the patch.

This patch and the peer-mode seems completely orthogonal to me.  But
in the forum discussion:

https://forums.freebsd.org/threads/carp-setup-hetzner-vswitch.82604/#post-538993

it seems that either of them solve the Hetzner problem.  May be I read it
wrong, though.  But Ivan's problem is some hardware problem, not Hetzner.
